Name: Lingsha
Desc: The new Cauldron Master of the Xianzhou Luofu's Alchemy Commission. An intelligent and quick-witted Vidyadhara healer.\nShe has a sharp sense of smell and often uses this to diagnose illnesses, as well as utilizing incense to calm the minds of others.\nShe is adept at dealing with complicated social relationships. Though she might be fuming inside, her expression would remain calm and serene.

1.Name: Bloom on Vileward Bouquet
1.Desc: Lingsha's Weakness Break Efficiency increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. When an enemy's Weakness is Broken, reduces their DEF by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

2.Name: Leisure in Carmine Smokeveil
2.Desc: When using Ultimate, all allies' Break Effect increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.Name: Shine of Floral Wick
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>. Talent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.Name: Redolence from Canopied Banquet
4.Desc: During Fuyuan's action, restores HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Lingsha's ATK for the ally with the currently lowest HP percentage.

5.Name: Poise Atop Twists and Turns
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>. Basic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Name: Arcadia Under Deep Seclusion
6.Desc: While Fuyuan is present on the battlefield, all enemies' All-Type RES reduces by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Fuyuan's attack additionally deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> hit(s) of DMG, with each hit dealing Fire DMG equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Lingsha's ATK and <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Toughness Reduction.

122201.Name: Votive Incense
122201.Desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK to a single target enemy.

122202.Name: Smoke and Splendor
122202.Desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies, restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> for all allies, and <u>Action Advances</u> Fuyuan by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

122203.Name: Dripping Mistscape
122203.Desc: Inflicts Befog on all enemies. When in the Befog state, <u>Break DMG</u> taken by affected enemies increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nDeals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies, and at the same time restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> for all allies. <u>Action Advances</u> Fuyuan by <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak>.

122204.Name: Mistdance Manifest
122204.Desc: Summons Fuyuan when using Skill. Fuyuan has an initial SPD of <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and an initial action count of <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak>. During Fuyuan's action, launch <u>follow-up attack</u> on all enemies, dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> Lingsha's ATK, dispels <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> <u>debuff(s)</u> from all allies, and restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> to all allies.\nFuyuan can accumulate a maximum of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> action counts. When the action count reaches 0 or when Lingsha is <u>downed</u>, Fuyuan disappears.\nWhile Fuyuan is present on the battlefield, using Lingsha's Skill increases Fuyuan's action count by <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak>.

122206.Name: Attack
122206.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and when the battle starts, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

122207.Name: Wisps of Aurora
122207.Desc: After using the Technique, immediately summons Fuyuan at the start of the next battle and inflicts Befog on all enemies, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

1.PointDesc: Increases this unit's ATK/Outgoing Healing by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of their Break Effect, up to a maximum ATK/Outgoing Healing increase of <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.
When using Basic ATK, additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

When any ally takes DMG or consumes HP, if their current HP percentage is less than or equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, Fuyuan will immediately trigger the follow-up attack from the Talent. This attack will not consume Fuyuan's action. This effect can be triggered again after <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
